path_filtered_workflows.reason: UI-only visual regression should run on UI source, UI specs, Playwright UI config and dependency lock changes without broad noisy triggers.
Production E2E is a remote no-token smoke by default, so it should run on production specs, prod Playwright config and dependency lock changes only.

unfiltered_workflows.reason: Main CI is the broad quality gate and must not hide code/test/config changes behind path filters.
Static GitHub Pages deploy intentionally follows all main/master pushes.
